💼 Gusto Payroll Integration
💼
Not Connected to Gusto
Connect your Gusto account to sync timesheets automatically every pay period.
📤 Export Timesheet to Gusto

Download a CSV formatted for Gusto's Time & Attendance import. Upload it in Gusto under Time → Import Hours.

Preview
Employee Dept Reg Hrs OT Hrs Rate Total Pay
🔄 Live Gusto API Sync

Connect your Gusto account for automatic two-way sync. Timesheets push to Gusto every pay period. Employee changes in Gusto pull back here.

Found in Gusto → Settings → Company Info
Get these at developers.gusto.com → Create App
Sync History
No syncs yet. Connect Gusto to start automatic payroll sync.
What Gets Synced
→ ADLP → Gusto: Hours worked, overtime, shift dates
← Gusto → ADLP: Employee list, pay rates, new hires
⟳ Both ways: Time-off requests, PTO balances
🟢 Connected to Gusto
Last sync: never
✨ Built-in AI Engine

Smart Schedule
Recommendations

I analyze your past scheduling data — who you schedule together, preferred shift times, department coverage, and attendance patterns — then generate an optimized next-week schedule. No API key or internet connection required.

Personal Information
Changes saved locally to your profile

Alert Notifications
🔕
Do Not Disturb is Off
You will receive all notifications based on your settings below. Turn on DND to silence everything temporarily.
OFF
🌙 Quiet Hours
Automatically silence notifications during these hours
to
🔔 Recent Notifications

📅
Schedule & Shifts
Alerts related to your schedule, new shifts, and changes
▶
Alert
📱 In-App
📧 Email
🔔 Push
Schedule Published
When your manager publishes or updates your weekly schedule
Shift Added to My Schedule
When a new shift is added to your personal schedule
Shift Removed or Changed
When a shift on your schedule is edited or deleted by a manager
Upcoming Shift Reminder
Reminder sent 1 hour before your scheduled shift begins
Open Shift Available
When an unassigned open shift is posted for your department
🔄
Time Off & Shift Swaps
Requests, approvals, and swap coordination
▶
Alert
📱 In-App
📧 Email
🔔 Push
Time Off Request Approved
When your time off request is approved by management
Time Off Request Denied
When your time off request is declined by management
Shift Swap Request Received
When a coworker asks to swap a shift with you
Swap Request Approved / Denied
When management responds to a shift swap request
🕐
Attendance & Time Tracking
Clock-in confirmations, missed punches, and attendance alerts
▶
Alert
📱 In-App
📧 Email
🔔 Push
Clock-In Confirmation
Confirmation when you successfully clock in to a shift
Clock-Out Reminder
Reminder to clock out at the end of your scheduled shift
Missed Punch Alert
When you forget to clock in or out of a scheduled shift
Early / Late Clock-In
Flagged when you clock in significantly early or late
💬
WorkChat & Messages
Direct messages, channel activity, and @mentions
▶
Alert
📱 In-App
📧 Email
🔔 Push
Direct Message Received
When a coworker or manager sends you a direct message
@Mention in Channel
When you are mentioned by name in a WorkChat channel
@everyone or @here
When a manager broadcasts to the whole team
Channel Message (not mentioned)
New messages in channels you follow when you are not @mentioned
👑
Manager Alerts
Staff activity, coverage gaps, and administrative alerts
▶
Alert
📱 In-App
📧 Email
🔔 Push
Time Off Request Submitted
When any staff member submits a time off request
Swap Request Submitted
When staff members request a shift swap needing approval
Staff Late or No-Show
When a scheduled staff member is late or has not clocked in
Coverage Gap Warning
When a shift is unassigned or department coverage drops below minimum
Schedule Acknowledgment
When a staff member acknowledges their published schedule
Overtime Risk Alert
When a staff member is approaching 40 hours for the week
📢
Company & System
Announcements, policy updates, and system alerts
▶
Alert
📱 In-App
📧 Email
🔔 Push
Company Announcements
Official announcements posted to the #announcements channel
Policy Updates
When company policies or handbook documents are updated
Login from New Device
Security alert when your account is accessed from an unrecognized device
Preferences are saved automatically as you change them
✅ Saved
Password & Security
Use a strong, unique password
